\nA geometric sequence is neither nonincreasing nor nondecreasing. Which is the possible value for the common ratio r?
d: A geometric sequence must be either nonincreasing or nondecreasing.

text: \nAn arithmetic sequence is neither nonincreasing nor nondecreasing. Which is the possible value for the common difference d?
answer: An arithmetic sequence must be nonincreasing or nondecreasing.
d: An arithmetic sequence must be nonincreasing or nondecreasing.
